chapter_title.en: Chapter on Rare Cases of Blood Money (diyyat)

text: 5390 - رَوَى عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الثُّمَالِيِّ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ‌ قَالَ: لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلًا ضَرَبَ رَجُلًا سَوْطاً لَضَرَبَهُ اللَّهُ سَوْطاً مِنَ النَّارِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5390 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Al-Thumali, from Sa'id ibn Al-Musayyab, from Jabir ibn Abdullah, who said:
"If a man strikes another man with a whip, Allah (swt) will strike him with a whip of fire."
